description:
We finally made it to Amsterdam! In this video, we’re sharing our first impressions as we explore this classic Dutch city. We met up with some very special people, wandered along the canals, tried some classic Dutch snacks, and rode bikes out to the famous Keukenhof Gardens. It was the perfect way to kick off our time in the Netherlands and get a feel for what makes Amsterdam so special!

FILMED - April 2025
